name: OneSignal
description: OneSignal is a customer engagement platform for push notifications, email, SMS, and in-app messaging. Use this API to send notifications across channels, manage users and segments, and track message delivery and engagement.

capabilities.name: send_notification
capabilities.description: Send push notifications, emails, or SMS to users or segments.

capabilities.name: manage_users
capabilities.description: Create, update, and manage user profiles and their subscriptions.

capabilities.name: manage_segments
capabilities.description: Create and delete user segments based on filters.

capabilities.name: view_notification
capabilities.description: Retrieve details and analytics for a sent notification.

capabilities.name: manage_templates
capabilities.description: Create, update, and manage reusable message templates.
